title: Limit System Access to Authorized Users, Processes, and Devices
description: limit system access to authorized users, processes acting on behalf of authorized users, and devices (including other systems)

checks.name: Authorized Users are Identified
checks.purpose: Verify authorized local and domain users are identified on the windows client

checks.name: Processes Acting on behalf of Authorized Users
checks.purpose: To ensure no process is acting anonymously

checks.name: Authorized Devices are Identified
checks.purpose: See if they are domain joined

checks.name: System Access is Limited to Authorized Users
checks.purpose: Checks to see if there is a list of authorized users

checks.name: System Access is Limited to Authorized Processes
checks.purpose: Ensure scheduled tasks and services run under named service accounts, not LocalSystem or anonymous identities

checks.name: System Access is Limited to Authorized Devices
checks.purpose: Verify Windows Defender Firewall rules and domain join status restrict access to approved devices and subnets only

checks.name: Authorized Users are Identified
checks.purpose: To see if authorized users exist via local accounts and AD group membership

checks.name: Processes Acting on Behalf of Authorized Users are Identified
checks.purpose: Ensure services and scheduled tasks run under named service accounts or gMSAs, not LocalSystem or anonymous identities

checks.name: Authorized Devices are Identified
checks.purpose: Verify the server is domain joined and computer accounts exist in AD for device identification

checks.name: System Access is Limited to Authorized Users
checks.purpose: Confirm AD group restrictions, logon rights policies, and RDP access are scoped to authorized users only

checks.name: System Access is Limited to Authorized Processes
checks.purpose: Ensure no orphaned or unknown service accounts exist and all services are mapped to documented, least-privilege identities

checks.name: System Access is Limited to Authorized Devices
checks.purpose: Verify Windows Defender Firewall rules restrict inbound access to approved subnets and domain-joined devices only

checks.name: Authorized Users are Identified
checks.expected_result: Non-empty list of named user accounts with no anonymous or generic accounts
checks.purpose: Enumerate local user accounts to confirm all users have unique, named identities and no unauthorized generic accounts exist

checks.name: Processes Acting on Behalf of Authorized Users are Identified
checks.purpose: Verify all running daemons and systemd services have a User= directive or named service account and none are running as root unnecessarily

checks.name: Authorized Devices are Identified
checks.purpose: Confirm SSH is restricted to known IP ranges or subnets via sshd_config or firewall rules (iptables/nftables/firewalld)

checks.name: System Access is Limited to Authorized Users
checks.expected_result: AllowUsers or AllowGroups populated with named entries; PermitRootLogin no
checks.purpose: Confirm SSH access is restricted to defined users or groups and root login is disabled

checks.name: System Access is Limited to Authorized Processes
checks.purpose: Ensure all systemd services run under a restricted named service account (e.g., www-data) with least privilege and no unnecessary root-level services

checks.name: System Access is Limited to Authorized Devices
checks.purpose: Verify iptables/nftables/firewalld rules restrict inbound connections to approved IP ranges and subnets only

checks.name: Authorized Users are Identified
checks.expected_result: Non-empty list of named user accounts with no anonymous or generic accounts
checks.purpose: Enumerate local user accounts to confirm all users have unique, named identities and no unauthorized generic accounts exist

checks.name: Processes Acting on Behalf of Authorized Users are Identified
checks.purpose: Verify all running daemons and systemd services have a User= directive or named service account and none are running as root unnecessarily

checks.name: Authorized Devices are Identified
checks.purpose: Confirm SSH is restricted to known IP ranges or subnets via sshd_config or firewall rules (iptables/nftables/firewalld)

checks.name: System Access is Limited to Authorized Users
checks.expected_result: AllowUsers or AllowGroups populated with named entries; PermitRootLogin no
checks.purpose: Confirm SSH access is restricted to defined users or groups and root login is disabled

checks.name: System Access is Limited to Authorized Processes
checks.purpose: Ensure all systemd services run under a restricted named service account (e.g., www-data) with least privilege and no unnecessary root-level services

checks.name: System Access is Limited to Authorized Devices
checks.purpose: Verify iptables/nftables/firewalld rules restrict inbound connections to approved IP ranges and subnets only
